subcategory: animated landing page hero with mouse-tracking gradient
use_cases: SaaS product landing page hero section with interactive mouse-following gradient effects
Creative portfolio or agency landing page featuring word-by-word text reveal animations
Digital service landing page with click ripple effects and floating element animations
Modern web product showcase with scroll-triggered animations and gradient overlays
Tech startup landing page with animated call-to-action elements and hover interactions
ai_summary: A sophisticated animated landing page hero featuring mouse-tracking gradient effects, word-by-word text reveal animations, click ripple effects, and floating elements. Built with React hooks for state management and global mouse event listeners. The dark, gradient aesthetic with glass-morphism accents makes it ideal for modern SaaS, fintech, and developer tool landing pages seeking a premium, animated user experience.
